The MethodWorkPowered by Maxxim3D Process Start a conversation

AI-powered · Human-approved

A whole agency, in a box.

Maxxim is a complete marketing agency in a box. AI does the work of a full agency, strategy, brand, website, content and campaigns, and a named human signs off every piece before it ships.

See the work → How it works →
maim maxxim

What you get

The work of a full agency, delivered as finished assets you own.

01

Strategy

Positioning and a plan you can act on.

02

Brand

Identity, voice and guidelines, locked.

03

Website

Launched live on your own domain.

04

Content

Written, designed and scheduled.

05

Campaigns

Run, measured and refined.

The trust gap

Agencies are human but slow. AI tools are fast but unaccountable.

Maxxim is built to be both at once, so the work arrives fast, accountable and finished.

01

Fast

AI runs the repeatable volume at speed. No agency drag.

02

Accountable

A named human signs off every gate. Every output carries a person.

03

Method-backed

A proven, gated process — not a prompt and a prayer.

The seam

AI runs the repeatable 80%. The human owns the 20% clients pay for.

20%Human · trust, taste, judgement
80%Machine · the repeatable volume, checked at every gate

Human in the loop is the point, not a limitation. No phase moves until a named person has signed it off.

The method

3D + Deepen

Discover, Design, Deploy, then the Deepen loop once the engine is live. Each phase is gated: nothing proceeds until a named human signs it off.

01

Discover

Always human. Context, audience, the real problem — mapped before a pixel is drawn.

02

Design

Strategy, positioning, identity and assets — signed off at the gate.

03

Deploy

Live work, owned by the client, on their own domain.

04

Deepen

The compounding loop that keeps the engine sharp.

Walk the method →

Inside Maxxim

The whole agency, on one screen.

Every client, every deliverable and every approval in one place: the operator dashboard, the client room, and the Brain.

Frames recreated from the live Maxxim dashboard.

The method, made visible

Four named specialists.

Max
The AI partner

Runs the 3D process, drafts every deliverable, keeps each client moving.

Sal
Design Studio

Generates and refines brand visuals, grounded in the client's own brief.

Pip
Social Studio

Drafts, schedules and publishes social — only after a human approves.

Ari
The Brain

Answers anything about a client, grounded in every document held.

The Brain

Every client gets a Brain.

Ari is an assistant grounded only in that client's documents — nothing generic, nothing borrowed. Ask a question, get an answer with the full engagement behind it. Anything worth keeping lands in their Files. Clients get Ari in their portal; the team gets the same context in Cowork.

The Brain holds everything. The human at the wheel decides what it's for.

Selected work

Finished, owned outcomes.

All work →
Automotive retail Launched

Jewell Tyres

A tyre retailer given a buy-online flow that actually sells — and an admin the team can run.

Live trading site shipped and refined →
Health & science Case study

Ultimate Labs

A closed supply chain for research-grade peptides, given a brand that reads as seriously as its gate.

Closed access by application, not checkout →
Health & wellness Launched

Pottsville Acupuncture

Two practices unified under one calm, credible brand — launched and owned by the client.

Launched and owned by the client →

The whole agency, in a box, with a human at the wheel.

Strategy to campaigns, done at AI speed and signed off by a named person. Yours from day one.

Ask Maxxim · answers from approved source only

Ask about the method, accountability, ownership, or the work. I answer only from Maxxim's approved material — anything else, I'll point you to a human.
